name: Chicken Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (10.75 oz each) cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix onion soup mix, cream of mushroom soup, milk, cooking wine, and rice in a small mixing bowl.
2. Spray Crock-Pot with cooking spray.
3. Lay chicken breasts in the Crock-Pot.
4. Place one tablespoon margarine on each chicken breast.
5. Pour soup mixture over chicken breasts.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
8. Cook on Low for 8-10 hours or on High for 4-6 hours.
9. Serves 6.
